purpose: P4 RCAEngine deterministic-first heuristics seed corpus

defects.title: Creator dashboard is meaningful, not an empty blank: verify the CC dashboard shows instance status and meaningful navigation, or an instructive empty state if no instance exists.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: SPEC: Increase run-journeyhawk.sh --maxTurns to 50 for all journeys. J01 steps 1-3,5-6 PASSED — dashboard IS functional. Step 4 was pending only due to 30-turn limit. Not a product defect. PREVENTION: pass --maxTurns 50 in run-journeyhawk.sh.

defects.title: Creator can update instance persona and it saves: verify the persona/greeting settings form loads, accepts changes, and persists them after navigation.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: QA SETUP FIX APPLIED: CC access_grant role_id was NULL — no role. CC routes_instance.py requires role=instance_owner. Fixed: UPDATE access_grants SET role_id=owner-uuid WHERE id=cbf0b62a. PREVENTION: JourneyHawk CC QA account setup must grant role=owner on e2e-test-instance. Add to pre-flight checklist.

defects.title: Creator sees analytics that mean something: verify the CC analytics page loads, shows non-trivial data or an informative empty state, and the date range selector is interactive.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: QA SETUP FIX APPLIED: Same root as defect_id=15 — analytics API also requires instance_owner role. role_id was NULL in access_grants. Fixed: same UPDATE. PREVENTION: Same as defect_id=15. Both settings and analytics require owner role — QA grant must specify role=owner.

defects.title: Widget responds to visitor questions using content knowledge: verify the CC API returns a substantive, content-relevant answer about Phronex Solutions for the e2e-test-instance.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: TRANSIENT FAILURE: J07/J09 proved EC2:8000 IS reachable. J06 hit connectivity blip (possibly brief CC restart or CORS issue in that browser context). SPEC FIX: Widget API journeys should use cc.phronex.com (production hostname) rather than raw EC2 IP. PREVENTION: Deep widget journeys must use PHRONEX_CC_TEST_URL env var resolved from .qa.env, never hardcoded EC2 IP.

defects.title: AI stays in character for off-topic questions: verify the widget politely declines off-topic queries and redirects without breaking character or exposing system internals.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: TEST INFRA: Step 1 passed (anon auth OK). Steps 2-6 pending = max_turns exhausted. Auth step consumed ~25 turns retrying and verifying. PREVENTION: pass --maxTurns 50 in run-journeyhawk.sh. Widget in-character behavior untested — needs clean re-run with higher turn limit.

defects.title: Widget handles conversation context (multi-turn): verify the AI maintains context across multiple messages in the same conversation, not starting fresh each time.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: TRANSIENT/SPEC: CC API unreachable (same root as defect_id=17). J09 (same endpoint, later run) passed. PREVENTION: Widget journeys should use PHRONEX_CC_TEST_URL from .qa.env. Also multi-turn context journey should chain off J06 conversation_id — depends on J06 passing first.

defects.title: Creator's billing tier and limits are visible: verify the CC billing/subscription page shows the current tier, message limit, and a functional upgrade path.: error during execution
defects.regression_test_ref: BROKEN: Portal proxy /api/cc/user/api/v1/billing/status returns 502. Root: CC billing adapter not initialized on DevServer test environment (no Razorpay keys in CC .env). routes_billing._require_billing_adapter() returns 503 which portal proxy maps to 502. PREVENTION: Add CC billing adapter init check to JourneyHawk pre-flight. Required: RAZORPAY_TEST_KEY_ID in CC backend .env on DevServer.

defects.regression_test_ref: SPEC FIX (not a product defect): /cc/conversations does not exist — conversation history is built as SessionHistoryClient in /cc/dashboard (Sessions tab). Committed 149d917 (feat: expose Convos to owners). J02 spec must navigate to /cc/dashboard and locate the Sessions tab, not /cc/conversations. Fix cc-deep.json J02 step 2 URL.
